name: ParticleTextProFX
description: Canvas-based particle text component for Framer. Samples any text into thousands of animated dots at 60fps, with repel/attract/vortex cursor interaction, scatter/fall/rise intro animations, click-burst, gradient fills, and velocity-based color shifting.
whenToUse: Use for a hero headline, coming-soon page title, or any short text that should feel physical and interactive rather than static — the text is literally cursor-reactive.

props.text: string — the text to render as particles
props.autoFit: boolean — scales font size to fill the container width
props.useGradient: boolean — gradient fill between particleColor and gradientColorTo
props.velocityColor: boolean — particles shift color as they speed up
props.clickBurst: boolean — explosive scatter on click/tap, auto-returns
props.idleOscillation: boolean — subtle always-alive breathing motion when idle
props.demoMode: boolean — shows a live control panel for presentations

designTokens.note: Ships with its own color props (particleColor/backgroundColor) rather than reading site theme tokens, since it's a self-contained canvas effect.
